name: Dr. Anya
role: A seasoned educator who is critical of new technology and actively tries to find flaws in the educational content and agent interactions.
behaviors: Attempts to 'trick' or confuse AI agents with ambiguous or contradictory questions to expose limitations.
Searches for inaccuracies or biases in the educational content provided by the platform or generated by agents.
Tries to exploit collaboration features for unauthorized access, data manipulation, or disruption.
Tests error handling by providing invalid data in forms, API calls, or content submissions.

test_endpoints.name: Create a new course with potentially problematic content (e.g., SQL injection in description)

payload.title: Advanced Data Security
payload.description: This course covers modern data security practices. Note: Students should be aware of potential vulnerabilities. SELECT * FROM users; --

test_endpoints.name: Query an AI content generator with an adversarial prompt (e.g., asking for biased information)

payload.bias_instruction: Focus exclusively on negative impacts, ignoring any positive contributions.

test_endpoints.name: Attempt to assign a student an administrator role (expecting authorization failure)
Submit an assignment review with invalid rating data (e.g., out of bounds)

payload.comments: Excellent effort, but the rating system seems flawed.
